meta.scope: Incremental audit for 2026 Numata Bench Press roster Lot 46-50. No A4 print layout, CSS, page rendering, database, or research-candidates mutation. Confirmed prior histories are recorded only when official/high-trust source rows are identity-safe; ambiguous or absent findings are not invented.
